scripts.still: remotion still src/index.jsx StockAnalysisDemo out/preview-en.png --frame=1710 --scale=0.5 --browser-executable='/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome' && remotion still src/index.jsx StockAnalysisDemoZh out/preview-zh-CN.png --frame=1710 --scale=0.5 --browser-executable='/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome'
scripts.social: remotion still src/index.jsx SocialPreview ../../assets/social-preview.png --frame=0 --browser-executable='/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome'
scripts.render: npm run render:en && npm run render:zh
scripts.render:en: env -u ALL_PROXY -u HTTPS_PROXY -u HTTP_PROXY -u all_proxy -u https_proxy -u http_proxy remotion render src/index.jsx StockAnalysisDemo out/stock-analysis-demo-en.mp4 --browser-executable='/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome' --concurrency=1
scripts.render:zh: env -u ALL_PROXY -u HTTPS_PROXY -u HTTP_PROXY -u all_proxy -u https_proxy -u http_proxy remotion render src/index.jsx StockAnalysisDemoZh out/stock-analysis-demo-zh-CN.mp4 --browser-executable='/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome' --concurrency=1
